title: Is Amazon a good long-term investment? Its buy-and-hold prospects explained
full_text: Amazon is the world’s largest online retailer, with a market capitalization exceeding $2.5 trillion as of June 2026. The company started in the early years of the internet, survived the dot-com bust, and grew into a worldwide tech powerhouse. At the same time, Amazon expanded its digital footprint, ...
